issues.note: sdk-driver path denies tools (read on repo source/_test.go files, shell sed) the workflow legitimately needs; after 5 denials the harness aborts the attempt. The denied tools are in the workflow's ...

issues.title: Copilot agent job concludes failure despite producing a valid agent_output report
issues.recurrence: RECUR 2026-06-12 x3: Smoke Copilot (gpt-5.4) agent SUCCEEDED (exitCode=0) and emitted a valid FAIL-status smoke report (create_issue #38943, set_issue_type, add_comment all OK per safe-output-items.jsonl) on 3 runs (27444195593, 27443692618…
issues.note: Likely two root causes under one id: (a) safe_outputs partial-failure-intolerance reds a job after a valid agent run; (b) empty-output agent failures. Smoke variant most affected.

issues.title: create_discussion safe-output lacks label + temporary_id fields
issues.note: Product gap surfaced by smoke test: create_discussion cannot attach labels (e.g. ai-generated) or a temporary_id for cross-referencing.

issues.title: awf-cli-proxy container DIFC liveness probe fails (localhost:18443 connection refused)
issues.detail: awf-cli-proxy container errors at startup; DIFC proxy liveness probe to localhost:18443 connection refused -> agent never starts (turns=0). 2 runs, pre-incident 18:xx.

issues.title: 429 Maximum AI credits exceeded (account/daily credit cap ~1000) aborts heavy prod-main run mid-flight
issues.note: Daily Ambient Context Optimizer (copilot, prod-main, run 27233269431) ran 57 turns / 3.0M tokens then the Copilot API returned CAPIError 429 'Maximum AI credits…
issues.fix: Add a soft pre-cap credit guard that checks remaining daily AI credits before the heaviest aggregation turns and degrades gracefully (emit partial output + noop) instead of 429-aborting; or raise the cap for the few heavy prod-main aggregators; or shard Ambient's work across smaller runs.

issues.title: Copilot CLI step hits hard action timeout (5/15-min tiers) — legit overrun OR degenerate self-loop
issues.recurrence: RECUR 2026-06-15 (count 1): Repository Tree Map Generator (copilot, run 27564209286) Execute Copilot CLI timed out after 5min, tok=579624 partial work. Recurs after quiet since 06-10.
issues.note: Test Quality Sentinel (copilot, PR branch copilot/feature-dangerously-disable-sandbox-agent, run 27234356749) ran 20 turns / 649k tokens of valid review work, t…
issues.fix: Raise the Copilot CLI step timeout for review-heavy workflows, or add periodic checkpoint flushing of the review so a timeout still emits the buffered safe-output instead of reddening with nothing.

issues.title: Image download step fails pulling node:lts-alpine from Docker Hub (registry-1.docker.io) — exit 123, agent nev
issues.note: download_docker_images.sh pulls all ghcr.io images successfully but TIMES OUT on the single Docker Hub image node:lts-alpine: 'Error response from daemon: Get h…
issues.fix: Mirror/cache node:lts-alpine in ghcr.io (or pin to a ghcr-hosted node image) so the agent setup no longer depends on Docker Hub; alternatively authenticate Docker Hub pulls to lift the anonymous rate limit, or add a longer/backed-off retry.

issues.title: repo-memory push fails: new orphan memory branch needs a manually-seeded signed first commit (GH013 rule viola
issues.note: AGENT SUCCEEDED (agent/detection/safe_outputs all success) but the post-agent push_repo_memory job failed 4/4 attempts: 'remote: error: GH013: Repository rule v…
issues.fix: Seed memory/git-simulator manually with one signed commit (per the harness instructions), OR have the repo-memory push step create the orphan branch's first commit as a signed commit, OR exempt memory/* branches from the signed-commit ruleset.

issues.title: Gemini model unknown_model_ai_credits: no AI-credits pricing / default fallback
issues.recurrence: RECUR 2026-06-14 (count 4): Smoke Gemini 0/2; gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview pricing still missing. PR-branch by-design probe.
issues.fix: Add gemini-3.1-flash-tts-preview (and likely other new gemini models) to the api-proxy AI-credits pricing table, OR set apiProxy.defaultAiCreditsPricing fallback (e.g. {input:3.0,output:15.0}) in AWF config so unknown models do not hard-fail.

issues.title: daily_effective_workflow_exceeded gate fails activation -> agent skipped -> PR run reddened
issues.recurrence: NEW 2026-06-11. ~20:05-20:51Z the daily effective-workflow budget cap tripped (activation output daily_effective_workflow_exceeded=='true'). Affected 3x Matt Pocock Skills Reviewer + 1x Test Quality S…
issues.fix: Consider surfacing daily-cap gating as a neutral/skipped conclusion (or a clear annotation) instead of run=failure so PR authors don't see false red. Confirm the cap threshold is intended for the evening burst.

issues.title: AOAI apikey path: persistent 'transient API error. Retrying...' loop burns tokens then fails
issues.recurrence: RECUR 2026-06-14 (count 4): Smoke Copilot AOAI apikey+Entra both 0-tok startup fails. PR probes.
issues.fix: Cap retry budget / add max-token guard on AOAI smoke probe so a transient-error loop can't burn 2M+ tokens. Investigate AOAI o4-mini-aw endpoint stability.

issues.title: Copilot CLI requires Node.js but 'node' not available inside AWF chroot — agent never starts
issues.recurrence: RECUR 2026-06-13 (count 2): Daily Issues Report Generator exit 127 command-not-found (workflow_dispatch). Confirms 06-12 chroot-node onset is recurring.
issues.fix: Ensure node (setup-node/nvm install path) is bind-mounted into /host and on PATH inside the AWF chroot, OR bundle a node binary into the chroot image. Add a chroot smoke check that `node --version` resolves before invoking Copilot CLI so this fails fast with a clear message rather than mid-entrypoint.

issues.title: codex MCP setup 'Failed to find gh-aw binary for MCP server' exit1 despite binary built+copied
issues.recurrence: NEW 2026-06-15: Daily Cache Strategy Analyzer (codex, run 27571281247) exit1. Binary built (go build) + copied to RUNNER_TEMP and /usr/local/bin/gh-aw per logs, yet MCP-helper reported binary-not-found. NEW signature (prior chronic fail=model-not-found gpt-5-codex-alpha). wf flagged 100% fail-rate.
issues.note: Path-mismatch between binary placement and codex MCP-helper lookup. Distinct from model-param-config-incompatibility.

issues.title: Copilot agent job no 'agent' artifact (tok=0); conclusion fails 'Artifact not found for name: agent'
issues.recurrence: NEW 2026-06-15: Daily Security Observability Report (copilot, run 27564289635). Setup ok (gh aw v0.79.8) but agent emitted no output/artifact (tok=0); conclusion hard-failed on missing 'agent' artifact. Likely copilot CLI startup fail pre-output.
issues.note: Watch recurrence; may be same family as chroot-node / startup-0tok failures.

issues.title: upload_assets safe-output job failure reddens an otherwise fully-successful run (agent+safe_outputs+detection all green)
issues.recurrence: RECUR 2026-06-17 (count 2): Daily Project Performance Summary Generator copilot run 27720651183 — observability flagged 100% failure (1/1), GitHub status=completed 21.7m. Same upload_assets safe-output reddening signature as 06-16. Still unfixed.
affected: Daily Code Metrics and Trend Tracking Agent
Daily Project Performance Summary Generator (Using MCP Scripts)
issues.note: Variant of safe-output-partial-failure-intolerance isolated to the upload_assets chart-upload job. Same upload_asset path this audit agent uses.
issues.fix: Make upload_assets non-fatal to overall run conclusion (skip-and-warn) OR add retry/validation so a transient asset upload failure does not red a successful agent run.
